options: Leaving one's own country to settle in another
Coming to live permanently in a foreign country
Moving to a different city in the same country

questions.enonce: 'Push factors' are the reasons why people want to leave their home country.
A {{1}} is a person who has been forced to leave their country to escape war or persecution.

pairs.right: Protection granted by a nation to a refugee
Official document to enter or stay in a country
Status of being a legal member of a country

questions.enonce: What does 'integration' mean in the context of migration?
options: The process by which migrants become part of a new society
